parameters.functionCode:
const filename = $json.attachment.fileName || $json.attachment.name || ('attachment-' + Date.now());
return [{ json: { ...$json, candidateFileName: filename } }];

return [{ json: { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), messageId: $json.messageId, sender: $json.sender, uploadedFile: $json.uploadFileName, targetFolderId: $json.targetFolderId, status: 'uploaded' } }];
